_source: Derived from the game's Dramatis Personae (Character List PDF): the public, player-neutral description of the cast. Entries 1-40 are the listed characters (papabile cardinals, senior and junior cardinals, functionaries, monarchs and the Roman Mob). The remaining entries are non-player figures named in the document's 'other historical figures' list. 'what_they_want' is a neutral, third-person summary of each figure's public aims: it must never contain second-person framing from any one player's packet. PC-relative columns (our_opinion, is_ally, is_key, etc.) are intentionally absent; each player authors those from their own sheet.

characters.name: Rodrigo Borgia
characters.title: Cardinal, Vice-Chancellor of the Church
characters.what_they_want: The papacy, which he has chased against Sixtus and Innocent and will chase again; meanwhile, control of the functionaries.

characters.name: Oliviero Carafa
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: To serve the Dominican Order and the interests of Naples and Aragon, to which his family is closely tied.

characters.name: Giovanni Colonna
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Destruction of his Guelph rivals the Orsini, and the prestige and reward of being the Emperor's envoy.

characters.name: Francesco "Samson" Nanni
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: The triumph of the Franciscans over the Dominicans, and a new crusade against the Turk.

characters.name: Giambattista Orsini
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Guelph dominance and the Roman Mob, his man Pitigliano kept as papal commander, and the Medici tie protected.

characters.name: Francesco Todeschini Piccolomini
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Piccolomini family interests. Rivals of the Malavolti in Siena.

characters.name: Giuliano della Rovere
characters.title: Cardinal, Major Penitentiary
characters.what_they_want: The papacy, with Charles's backing; to be the warrior-cardinal who rules as Caesar.

characters.name: Ascanio Visconti Sforza
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: To keep Milan and the Sforza throne, and above all to survive the French.

characters.name: Gioacchino Torriani
characters.title: Cardinal, Inquisitor General, Master of the Sacred Palace
characters.what_they_want: Truth, scholarship, heresy hunting. Dominican. Zealous.

characters.name: Pierre d'Aubusson
characters.title: Cardinal, Grand Master of Knights Hospitaller
characters.what_they_want: A great Crusade to free Constantinople and drive back the Ottomans.

characters.name: Guillaume Briçonnet
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: To advance Charles's interests and guard him from a hostile pope.

characters.name: Paolo Campofregoso
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Restore Fregoso control of Genoa. 3x Doge, pirate, betrayed by family. Exiled.

characters.name: Jorge da Costa
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Survival. Brilliant Portuguese commoner. Banished by King João but possibly still serving him.

characters.name: Maffeo Gherardi
characters.title: Cardinal, Patriarch of Venice
characters.what_they_want: Nothing much. Ancient, senile, fading fast.

characters.name: Giovanni "Achilles" Antonio Sangiorgio
characters.title: Cardinal, Postulator General
characters.what_they_want: Run canonization process. Legal expertise. Sforza-adjacent.

characters.name: Francesco Soderini
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Bitter enemy of Medici. Florentine, loves the classics.

characters.name: Giovanni Battista Zen
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Unknown. Corruptly appointed, rarely leaves Venice.

characters.name: Pietro Bembo
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Humanism, scholarship. Venetian noble.

characters.name: Michel de Bucy
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: To please his cousin the king, and to hunt and dance.

characters.name: Adriano "Hadrian" Castellesi
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Papal ambassador to England.

characters.name: Ippolito d'Este
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Stability and respect, and to keep his brother-in-law Ludovico in Milan and Charles out.

characters.name: Giovanni "Leo" de Medici
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: Medici supremacy and the protection of the family's wealth; inclined toward France.

characters.name: Raffaele Riario
characters.title: Cardinal, Camerlengo
characters.what_they_want: To rise with his uncle and patron della Rovere, whose nephew and heir he is; a lover of art.

characters.name: Federico Sanseverino
characters.title: Cardinal Deacon of San Teodoro
characters.what_they_want: His family's fortunes and a Roman career, backed by his many Ghibelline kin and Sforza blood.

characters.name: Matthäus Schiner
characters.title: Cardinal
characters.what_they_want: To sell Swiss mercenaries this season; Switzerland's pay is what he truly answers to.

characters.name: Cesare "Valentino" Borgia
characters.title: Treasurer, Bishop of Valencia
characters.what_they_want: Borgia family interests. Hot-tempered, brawls often.

characters.name: Alessandro Farnese
characters.title: Papal Chaplain
characters.what_they_want: Roman Mob connections. Noble but impoverished.

characters.name: Michelotto Corella
characters.title: Captain of the Papal Guard
characters.what_they_want: Borgia loyalist. Physically intimidating.

characters.name: Gherardo Maffei
characters.title: Chief Secretary
characters.what_they_want: Retirement. Secretary for four popes.

characters.name: Johann Burchard
characters.title: Father, Master of Ceremonies
characters.what_they_want: Running ceremonies and logistics.

characters.name: Josquin des Prez
characters.title: Choir Director
characters.what_they_want: Music. Greatest composer alive.

characters.name: Constantine
characters.title: Clerk
characters.what_they_want: Refugee Greek scholar from Constantinople.

characters.name: Tillio
characters.title: Clerk
characters.what_they_want: Roman commoner, Benedictine monk.

characters.name: Maximilian I
characters.title: Emperor (House of Hapsburg)
characters.what_they_want: To be crowned Emperor by the pope and acknowledged master of Italy.

characters.name: Charles VIII
characters.title: King of France (House of Valois)
characters.what_they_want: Naples, Milan, and Savoy by conquest, and to keep Brittany and his queen Anne.

characters.name: Isabella I
characters.title: Queen of Castile (House of Trastámara)
characters.what_they_want: To keep Naples from France and secure the Spanish inheritance for her grandson Carlos.

characters.name: Henry VII
characters.title: King of England, Scotland, France, Lord of Ireland (House of Tudor)
characters.what_they_want: The French crown he claims, and a strong hand against Charles.

characters.name: Anne
characters.title: Duchess of Brittany, Queen of France (House of Montfort)
characters.what_they_want: Release from a marriage she fears God has cursed.

characters.name: Beatrice
characters.title: Queen of Hungary and Bohemia (House of Trastámara)
characters.what_they_want: To keep Hungary and Bohemia strong for her husband Vladislaus; kin to the d'Este and to Naples.

characters.name: The Roman Mob
characters.title: SPQR
characters.what_they_want: SPQR! Chaos, bread, circuses. Can storm conclave, kill, destroy.

characters.name: Ferrante I
characters.title: King of Naples
characters.what_they_want: Hold Naples. Crush rebels. Maintain Aragonese control.

characters.name: Ludovico Sforza
characters.title: Duke of Milan
characters.what_they_want: Hold Milan. Resist French invasion. Maintain Sforza power.

characters.name: Guidobaldo da Montefeltro
characters.title: Duke of Urbino
characters.what_they_want: Protect Urbino. Advance Montefeltro family. Find marriages for Gonzaga. Attack Guelph Florence (family pride). Collect antiquities.

characters.name: Francesco Gonzaga
characters.title: Marquess of Mantua
characters.what_they_want: Protect Mantua. Find a worthy bride. Fight alongside Guidobaldo.

characters.name: Ferdinand II
characters.title: King of Aragon
characters.what_they_want: Control Naples. Unite Spain. Expand Aragonese power.

characters.name: King Ferrante's son, Crown Prince Alfonso
characters.title: Crown Prince of Naples
characters.what_they_want: Inherit Naples.

characters.name: Pandolfo Malatesta
characters.title: Lord of Rimini
characters.what_they_want: Hold Rimini. Expand Malatesta territory. Sack things.

characters.name: Lorenzo de Medici
characters.title: First Citizen of Florence (unofficial)
characters.what_they_want: Control Florence. Advance Medici banking empire. Protect his son Cardinal Leo.

characters.name: Giovanni Bentivoglio
characters.title: First Citizen of Bologna
characters.what_they_want: Ducal title more than anything. Hold Bologna. Serve whoever can make him a duke.

characters.name: Galahad "Fortunato" Sanseverino
characters.title: Commander of Sforza armies
characters.what_they_want: Serve Ludovico. Maintain his position as Sforza's right hand. Accumulate wealth.

characters.name: Duchess Elizabetta Gonzaga
characters.title: Duchess of Urbino
characters.what_they_want: Support Guidobaldo. Advance Gonzaga/Montefeltro interests. Correspond with courts across Italy.

characters.name: Fabrizio Colonna
characters.title: Grand Constable of Naples
characters.what_they_want: Colonna family interests. Serve Naples (nominally). Ghibelline cause.

characters.name: Giovanni della Rovere
characters.title: Duke of Sora
characters.what_they_want: To fight at his brother the cardinal's command, hold Sora, and advance della Rovere interests.

characters.name: Sultan Bayezid II
characters.title: Ottoman Sultan
characters.what_they_want: Expand Ottoman Empire. Neutralize his imprisoned brother Cem. Conquer Hungary.

characters.name: King João II of Portugal
characters.title: King of Portugal
characters.what_they_want: Portuguese maritime empire. Trade monopolies. Handle succession (Crown Prince Alfonso died in accident last year).
